title: Cobblemon Origins
description: A Cobblemon Server like you've never seen before!
body:
Discord Store


Cobblemon Origins is a lightweight Fabric experience optimized for performance and fair play.

## ⚔️ Battling & Progression **Pure F2P** *A fair, play-to-win environment where every item and Pokémon is earned through gameplay*
**Ranked Matchmaking** *Climb the global leaderboard in 1v1 or 2v2 competitive and random battle tiers*
**Revamped Raids** *Take on high-difficulty encounters to challenge and capture rare Legendary Pokémon*
**World Bosses & Hunts** *Track down powerful bosses hidden across the world to claim elite loot*
**Gyms & Tournaments** *Face off against real player Gym Leaders or compete in massive server-wide tournaments*
**Daily Missions & Quests** *Progress through unique questlines and daily tasks designed to reward your journey* ## 🛠️ Server Mechanics **Custom Powered Pokémon** *Add specific Pokémon to your party to unlock passive utility and survival buffs*
**Catch Combos System** *Chain consecutive catches of the same species to hunt for Shinies and Hidden Abilities*
**Breeding & Daycare** *Perfect your team’s IVs and movesets with our deep, player-friendly breeding system*
**Complete Pokédex** *Catch every species from every generation, including ZA Megas and custom forms*
**Custom Pokémon Skins** *Collect and display hundreds of unique, high-quality variant skins for your team*
**Player Cosmetics** *Personalize your character with a wide array of custom hats, accessories, and particles*
**Wondertrade** *Test your luck by trading Pokémon away for a completely random surprise from the community*
## 🌍 World & Customization **Shared Loot & PokéStops** *Enjoy player-side loot where resources never run out, plus hidden stops for extra gear*
**Terralith Generation** *Explore a stunning world featuring overhauled biomes and realistic terrain*
**Land Claiming & Furniture** *Claim your territory and decorate with hundreds of interactive custom blocks*
**Rustles & HA Spawns** *Keep an eye out for rustling grass for a chance at rare Hidden Ability and Shiny encounters*
**RTP & Exploration** *Instantly teleport into the vast wilderness to start your adventure and find unclaimed land* **Custom NPCs** *Encounter a living world filled with specialized traders, lore-rich guides, and quest-givers* ## 💰 Economy & Community **Global Trade (GTS)** *Buy and sell Pokémon or items with ease through our unified player marketplace*
**Shiny Auctions** *Join high-energy, player-driven live auctions to bid on the rarest Pokémon on the server*
**Seasonal Collectibles** *Participate in limited-time events to earn exclusive items and unique event Pokémon*
**Server Shop** *A massive selection of blocks and decorations to build your perfect home or gym*
**PokéSell** *Quickly exchange unwanted Pokémon for currency to fund your next adventure*
![Origins Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sbGV8l0I/images/4a9a690536a5c3d9ade1fead3e12f715a7a8db0a.png) # _Play Origins Today!_ **[Discord](https://discord.gg/Rhd62tkW9M) • [Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblemon-origins)**
